title: Sexphone & the Lonely Wave
original_title: Sexphone คลื่นเหงา สาวข้างบ้าน
overview: A woman who through a series of misunderstandings ends up giving a speech about sex on the radio. She makes an impression on the male on-air host. What the two don't realize is that they are neighbors who despise each other. Will their attraction be enough to overcome the feud?
